security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Read-only observability for the sentinel/ghost agent-security stack.
bundle.longDescription: seance tails and joins the sentinel and ghost audit logs and shows the aftermath. Read-only by construction: no write scope, no shell, no network, no updater.
